title: Saitama UI
description: Subtly adds Saitama from One Punch man into the inventory GUI.
body:
Added the famous "OK" panel from the One Punch Man manga as pixel art to both survival and creative inventory's. I also included the fist punch instead of a cross for the Destroy Items button in the creative mode inventory. The idea was to keep everything subtle and unobtrusive to the vanilla experience, hope you enjoy!

NOTE: **This pack does not work for any version prior to 1.21.9**, however it should work on any future version of Minecraft. I could properly make ones for older versions if people ask for it.

![One Punch Man Saitama "OK" panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b08cdc30d5b48b224baaee08d5ab8d8ca96784b5.png)
